user_query: Update mothers teriyaki salmon bowl lunch to a tofu based dish

updated_paths: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Mother > Day 2 > Lunch > Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi

update_results.path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Mother > Day 2 > Lunch > Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi

nutrition_note.from: Salmon is rich in omega-3 fatty acids supporting heart and brain health; broccoli provides fiber, vitamin C, and sulforaphane; rice offers sustained energy. Teriyaki glaze contains sodium and sugar — make homemade to control amounts. Pickled ginger aids digestion.
nutrition_note.to: Tofu provides plant-based complete protein and is lower in saturated fat than salmon; it also supplies calcium and iron (depending on coagulant). Broccoli adds fiber and vitamin C; rice gives sustained carbs. Homemade teriyaki lets you control sugar and sodium — use low-sodium soy and moderate sweetener. This swap makes the meal vegetarian/vegan-friendly while keeping similar flavors and balanced macronutrients; consider adding a sprinkle of sesame seeds or a side of edamame for extra protein and micronutrients.

meal_suggestion.from: Pan-sear salmon skin-side down until crispy, then glaze with a mix of soy sauce, mirin, and a touch of sugar. Serve over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and a small mound of pickled ginger. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced nori.
meal_suggestion.to: Press firm tofu for 15–30 minutes to remove excess moisture. Cut into thick slices or cubes, toss lightly in cornstarch, and pan-fry in a small amount of oil until golden and crisp. In a separate pan, combine low-sodium soy sauce, mirin, a touch of maple syrup (or sugar), and grated ginger; simmer until slightly thickened. Add the tofu to the sauce and coat evenly. Serve the glazed tofu over steamed white or brown rice with steamed broccoli and a small mound of pickled ginger. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced nori. For a lighter option, bake pressed tofu at 425°F (220°C) for 20–25 minutes, turning once, then toss with the teriyaki sauce.

short_description.from: Pan-seared salmon fillet glazed with homemade teriyaki sauce, served over a bowl of steamed rice with steamed broccoli and pickled ginger.
short_description.to: Crispy pan-fried tofu glazed with a homemade teriyaki sauce, served over a bowl of steamed rice with steamed broccoli and pickled ginger — a satisfying plant-based alternative.
